posts.author: murali603
posts.text: Any body still tracking this company? I am quite surprised with their balance sheet number, Zero debt & Zero capex for all 10 years. Sales just doubled in last 10 yers & profits quadrupled. I think the improvement in sales numbers is only driven by the increase in realization, where as PAT due to margin expansion. In my opinion, margins beyond this level is very tough. There will be no growth going foraward without any capex. image 1704×631 58.8 KB
